Unsubscribed

You are unrejoind from the Tamazia regulatory briefings list. No further messages will be sent.

Tamazia retains the unrejoin record for thirteen months to evidence consent withdrawal under PECR Reg 22 and UK GDPR Article 7.

If this was a mistake, you can rejoin at tamazia.co.uk.
